<!-- SvelteKit + Chart.js Relationship Milestones App -->

- This project uses SvelteKit with Svelte 5 runes syntax ($state, $effect, $props, $derived)
- Chart.js is used for data visualizations (imported as `chart.js/auto`)
- Static adapter is configured for client-side-only deployment
- Data is persisted in browser localStorage
- Use CSS custom properties (--var) for theming (light/dark mode)
- All routes use client-side rendering (ssr = false)
